reviews.review_title: Rated 5 stars so you can see.
reviews.review_description: This game is actually a fake one and a virus and all the other reviews are bots. Don’t buy this game!!

I was playing for a little while and although it was fun the fruit and bomb hotboxes are too big and sensitive so its easy to lose via bomb

also there is not much to do and no tutorial for all the modes
I loved this game so much and i let my family also play it and they love it
best halfbrick game ever. also fun fact this is made by the studio that brought us thrill of the fight
This game is like iPhone, but cooler I love it so much it won’t get you bored ￼

This game is fun. Graphics and hand tracking is great. But only problem i have with this game is that it needs more things you can do. This game kept me occupied for 3 days they need to add more. But I know they have a second game but still they need to add more to the game. But other then that it was enjoyable.
WHERE IS MY MONEY I REFUNDED IT YESTERDAY AND NO MONEY LIKE WTF BAD GAME!!!!!

This game is really fun. It reminds me of the iPhone game and it has good carry over. Lots of people are complaining about the graphics but it’s really not bad, and quite frankly it’s really good. People also complain about the fruit being too close or the swords not being long enough and that is 100% user error. It’s a simple game, lots of fun. The survival mode is my favorite. And for people who say you can’t see everything, yeah it’s cause you’re supposed to move your head and body. Anyone complaining about this game is lazy or boring themselves because this is the best game I’ve found in vr. Great world building, and great themes. It is unfortunate that they made a second game instead of updating the current version. That’s just greedy. But if you buy this. You will have fun. Unless you are a sucky person, then you’ll have a sucky time.

I love fruit ninja on mobile a lot, then played this fruit ninja, and can I just say I am a true ninja of the fruit cutting. 

My wife loves this game as well. She has topped all the high scores for our account, and I struggle beating them! Thank you for making this game on the VR. Now I have a game that my wife makes challenging to win against her on. 

I rated five stars because this game makes my wife happy.

I just opened up my oculus after a ￼long while of not playing and I noticed that I lost all my blades and I’m not sure if I’m able to unlock them again if I can do I have to redo challenges or is this a bug please help.￼
Great game! Lots of fun for the whole family! Even if you’re not playing it’s fun to watch everyone compete for the highest score! So many laughs, cheers! Oh no’s had with this game high recommend

I mainly got this for my niece to be able to play,it is a stationary game so no motion sickness to worry about. She absolutely loves this game and surprisingly,I also enjoy a few sessions here and there myself. This is the type of game I normally wouldn’t even consider. I’m 41yrs old,I prefer more adult themed games with combat,free movement and a storyline but I still had some fun here. My niece is Fruit Ninja crazy though and she also loves Shave & Stuff. Another great games for kids is Arcon. it’s a game one person plays as a tree in VR who throws objects at squirrels played by people in your house on tablets or phones. The squirrels objective is to steel your acorns and make it back to their nest while the tree’s job is to try to prevent them from getting away with the acorns. It’s a great kid friendly party game
It's wicked 😁
This is the only game I keep coming back for. If you're going to buy one game, get this!
Wouldn’t work
Love this game! Very easy to play!
Bored in 5 minutes. Too close to the fruit or sword too long. Returning it
Very bad graphic and game process. This game is better on the phone (iPhone).

I am sooo disappointed with this game and developers. i have fruit ninja and you release fruit ninja 2 INSTEAD of just updating the current game. i AM NOT paying you an additional $25 for fruit ninja 2 when ALL other games update their current games with new levels and tactics. sorry but i am deleting this game, keep the funds, had you updated this game to bring it current you'd probably have more customers. instead you decide to cheat all your existing customers by having them spend $25 for fruit ninja 2. you are horrible developers that do not know how to cater to your audience.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review and honest feedback. Fruit Ninja VR 2 is designed as a unique spin on the gameplay of Fruit Ninja VR with a greater focus on multiplayer and non-traditional weapons. 

Fruit Ninja VR is designed and maintained as an original, arcade focused game that is easier to pick up and play for all.

We understand your disappointment and can only hope you give both games a chance for the experiences they offer.

reviews.review_description: Hello. I bought this by mistake. I was trying to buy Fruit Ninja 2. I bought the other one. Can I have a refund?
Bad not recommened anyone to get it , very boaring
This game is not good in graphics, and no coop mode instead of fixing this game, they developed another game fruit ninja 2 with multiplayer features, felt like cheated

it is not worth any money! it is an absolutely boring game. the fruits are too close in some modes so you cannot see them all at once. graphics animation is childish. the location looks like a bad cartoon.

 I totally regret about purchasing that title. unfortunately I don't see a refund button to get the money back., For me it was sufficient to play this game 5 minutes to understand the low quality of that title. Save the money for a better product like beat saber.

I find it very interesting and weirdly addictive ya not alot of content and kind of over priced but its alot of fun trying to beat you high score I do think it gets I little to much hate cuz it is a vr port of a mobile game that didn't have alot of content either so you cant expect to much from it I would recommend this game
It's pretty fun slashing the swords around and splitting fruit. Some variety, but not a lot and I'm not sure it really needs more. My daughter (8) is able to play and enjoy it.

What can I say its fruit ninja however this is just soooo much fun@ for all the family!! The graphics and frame rates are great the setting is awesome and theres a few different ways to play  survival being my favourite. I love the way ypu can choose between sword types, adds a little extra I guess. My kids and wide like this title too so is a good all rounder for cast g to a tv a trying to break records. The sounds are cool too. Fruit ninja just got a make over guys@@ well worth the monies.

I love Fruit Ninja. I've had it for mobile and Xbox Kinect. Yea, those platforms were fun to play Fruit Ninja on, but playing in VR, it feels like it was made for this. You really feel like your're in the game. If you're thinking that you already have it on mobile, Xbox etc so no need to buy it again, wrong, just get it for the quest 2, you'll have so much fun and get a good workout too. While playing you'll get to unlock achievements and swords.

One thing that could be better is the field of view in VR. Sometimes you can't see the fruit off to  the sides and end up missing some. Not a big deal, but would be better if they fixed that somehow.
Boring game

reviews.review_title: My favorite vr game, but can be better
reviews.review_description:
It’s fun, I really enjoy it.

Some things to be improved:

Like other reviewers pointed out, some fruits show up from outside of the viewable area which are hard, if not impossible to see.

I expect multiple scenes to be chosen.
I just don't get it. I feel brain dead here.
I don't like it is boring
You never get tired of this game.  The whole family really gets into it whenever we wip out the vr.  Highly recommended!
Game is really trash
i try to download， is not possible
I wouldn’t recommend
Not worth the money

reviews.review_title: How can I exit the game ?
reviews.review_description:
I tried to press the home button or 
menu button too many times but no luck. Had to reboot the headset every time.

Everything  looks/seems pretty much like the cell phone version but… i feel like I’m always reaching. I come forward I still have to reach to get at the fruit. Also is there a way to calorie count your burn when playing)
I thought it would be cool but it sucks
idk i got bored in less than 10 minutes
More swords should be unlocked at start

Fun game. Sitting down playing is good but standing is the best. Compared to the arcade version the vr version is the best. I played it with my girlfriend and she took it from me and played for hours....

developer_response.body:
Hi awinst21,
Thanks for the review - awesome to hear you're both enjoying the game!
-- Guillaume

reviews.review_description:
This game is only 3 stars because there is only one type of sword.  They should make it that you can unlock different swords like lightsabers and other swords.  Five stars on gameplay.




Update:
I think you should totally add more custom sabers.  I would love it if you could hit the swords together.  That would just add realism to the game.  I think you should also add that we can avoid bombs and not just hit them.  I think you should also give us custom environments like in beat saber.  You should also add new game modes.  ￼I bet if you give an update every month more people would buy this game.
This game is so much potential.
All of this would easily ￼￼make this a five star game.￼￼  thank you for adding what the community wants￼.

developer_response.body:
Hi TOBIAHJETT,

Thanks for your review! In a recent update we added 12 different unlockable blades to the game and also tweaked bombs to be less sensitive. I'm hoping this is what you were after? 
And I agree about being able to hit blades together, this is something we'd like to look at in the future.

We'd love it if you could install the latest update and consider updating your review if things have improved for you.

Thanks!
-- Guillaume

reviews.review_description: Yeah it’s a hard pass wish I could get a refund.

developer_response.body:
Hi BabyKnife,

Sorry to hear you didn't enjoy the game. We'd love to hear what didn't work for you so we can improve the game. Please feel free to share more details on our discord: https://discord.gg/fEPwAs

Thanks!
-- Guillaume

reviews.review_description: Would not recommend, it shouldn't be on vr..

developer_response.body:
Hi thomasmaddox,

Sorry to hear you're not enjoying the game. Please reach out to FruitNinjaVRSupport@halfbrick.com - we'd really like to know what isn't working for you so we can improve it.

Alternatively, we'd also love it if you could install the latest update and consider updating your review if things have improved for you!

Thanks!
-- Guillaume

reviews.review_description:
The game has four modes and that's it. You get one blade skin and nothing else. It's a fun VR experience however it is not worth the $15. Bombs are very sensitive and will get hit when you don't even touch near them. 

If they added skins to unlock for the sword, and fixed the bomb sensitivity then this game would be 5 stars.

developer_response.body:
Hi ChrisJonesGaming,

First of all, sorry about the bombs! We realise they've been giving our players a hard time. I just wanted to let you know that we tweaked them to be less sensitive; and we also added 12 new collectable blades which you might enjoy!

We'd love it if you could check out the latest update and consider updating your review if things have improved for you.

Thanks!
-- Guillaume

reviews.review_title: Recent update made the game unplayable
reviews.review_description: The collision detection in the current version is abysmal. Fruit slice when the sword did't touch them and bombs explode when the sword is feet away from them. I spent hours playing this , but I just can't any more. Please bring back the old version with uglier graphics and accurate physics

developer_response.body:
Hi kerinin,

Sorry about the bombs, you're not the only one having a hard time with them! I just wanted to let you know that we tweaked them to be more accurate; we also added 12 new collectable blades which you might enjoy!

We'd love it if you could check out the latest update and consider updating your review if things have improved for you.

Thanks!
-- Guillaume

reviews.review_description: Can you tell me? Where is the exit button? I can't find it.
It's a lot of fun but classic mode is hard since your swords don't like to cut stuff and bombs are hyper sensitve it makes ot really hard but other than that tons of fun would recommend!

Do you want me a dare or do you want to know how to get your stuff out for you tomorrow night and then we will go to get a little more sleep then we will be home by five so we will have a sleepover tomorrow morning ok ok thanks for your call thanks for the invite bye hello hello hi bye hi hi hello hello hi bye hello hello bye hi hello hi bye hello hi what are your thoughts on the phone number thanks for the invite thanks for your help bye hello bye hi hello hello bye
I love the graphics and movement smoothness
My family really enjoys this game.
A must play!
Feels like the XBOX version. So fun!

Its so much fun to just swing around swords before the game starts and strike a pose. This was a lot more fun and much more satisfying than I expected it to be. Sword unlocks are a nice addition instead of making them dlcs you have to buy. Great game 10/10
Amazing
This game is so much fun! It’s very fun to play on my VR Headset! And the game is cool! I like the Arcade Mode a lot it’s so much to play the game on my VR headset! 😎😎

I really was looking forward to this game. And as it might feel like you’re truly in the game everybody wish they were in growing up, it’s not the same effect. It’s difficult to not hit a bomb when it throws fruit fruit bomb fruit fruit. It’s not the like mobile game at all. Quite disappointed. Played it for a total of maybe 20 minutes and can’t figure out how to uninstall it and get my refund.
